title: Hand-rolled JSON scanner with zeroization guarantee must be kept
description: The json_extract_string_field scanner avoids serde_json because serde_json allocates plain (non-Zeroizing) Strings for all field values before dropping them. A contributor will inevitably suggest replacing this with serde_json for 'simplicity'. Resist: the DO NOT replace comment in the source explains exactly why, and that reason is load-bearing. The comment says: 'If a contributor suggests switching to serde_json, point them here.' That is the right response. The future-crate note (zeroizing-json-field) is also correct — this is genuinely missing from the ecosystem.
